articles.title: Natick engineer is found guilty of helping export tech to Iran in violation of sanctions
articles.description:
Mahdi Mohammad Sadeghi, who worked at the global electronics company Analog Devices, was accused of helping an Iranian business associate get around American export control laws.

The post Natick engineer is found guilty of helping export tech to Iran in violation of sanctions appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mahdi Mohammad Sadeghi was found guilty of violating U.S. export sanctions on July 13, 2026.
Sadeghi assisted an Iranian associate in circumventing American export control laws while at Analog Devices.
The case raises concerns about national security and local compliance with export regulations in Boston.

articles.title: ESPN ranks Drake Maye among NFL’s top-10 quarterbacks
articles.description:
"Size, athleticism, accuracy, playmaking upside through the roof, poise and toughness," an NFL coordinator said of Maye.

The post ESPN ranks Drake Maye among NFL’s top-10 quarterbacks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ESPN ranks Drake Maye as a top-10 NFL quarterback, highlighting his skills.
An NFL coordinator praised Maye for his size, athleticism, and playmaking ability.
Boston fans may see Maye as a potential future star in the league.

articles.title: Sam Neill, New Zealand actor who starred in ‘Jurassic Park’ and ‘The Piano,’ dies at 78
articles.description:
In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma.

The post Sam Neill, New Zealand actor who starred in ‘Jurassic Park’ and ‘The Piano,’ dies at 78 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sam Neill, renowned actor, passed away at 78 due to lymphoma.
Neill was diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma in 2023.
His death impacts Boston's film community and fans of his work.

articles.title: Australian wins first-ever Saugus Wing Eating Championship
articles.description:
Australia's James Webb edged Joey Chestnut and Massachusetts native Geoff Esper after stripping 7.77 pounds of Kowloon's signature Saugus Wings in 10 minutes.

The post Australian wins first-ever Saugus Wing Eating Championship appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: James Webb won the inaugural Saugus Wing Eating Championship on July 13, 2026.
He consumed 7.77 pounds of wings, surpassing Joey Chestnut and Geoff Esper.
The event highlights Saugus as a destination for food competitions, boosting local tourism.
